rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Component names, ports, and connections must be sourced from the input AADL model structure
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by placing annex content in valid scopes relative to component structure
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level bindings require placement in component implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-specific bindings in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports
